description: Window SUM over partition operates on existing rows and is non-nullable unlike aggregate SUM

columns.name: dept_total
columns.note: Window SUM always operates on at least the current row, so non-nullable

name: window_sum_over_partition
query_sql:
-- @name SumOverPartition
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, department, amount, SUM(amount) OVER (PARTITION BY department) AS dept_total FROM sales
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE sales (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, employee_id INTEGER NOT NULL, department TEXT NOT NULL, amount INTEGER NOT NULL, sale_date DATE NOT NULL);

sqlc_comparison.scythe_improvement: Window SUM always operates on at least the current row, so correctly marked non-nullable
sqlc_comparison.sqlc_behavior: May incorrectly mark window SUM as nullable like aggregate SUM
